home.noAthleteDesc: You don't have an athlete yet. Open a case in the Cases tab and start the road to greatness.

incubator.title: Incubator
incubator.subtitle: A case contains a random athlete. Rarity sets your training/mining multiplier.
incubator.rerollDesc: Splice your current athlete and get a new random fighter.
incubator.rerollConfirmDesc: Your current athlete will be destroyed and stats reset. This can't be undone.

cases.title: Cases
cases.subtitle: Open cases with $BULV to get athletes, pharma boosts and gear.
cases.rarityNote: Rarity gives a training & mining multiplier
cases.rerollWarning: Opening a new case will replace your current athlete and reset its stats
cases.allOwned: You already own all gear — no need for this case
cases.equalOdds: Any of {{count}} items with equal odds

training.title: Training Camp
training.subtitle: Spend energy, pump stats. Genetics gives a chance to crit.
training.noEnergy: Not enough energy. Refill it in the Nutrition tab.

nutrition.title: Nutrition
nutrition.subtitle: Restore energy and keep your mining rate high.

water.name: Water
water.desc: Quick energy top-up. Cheap and simple.

protein.name: Protein Shake
protein.desc: A big chunk of energy for a serious set.

carbs.name: Carb Load
carbs.desc: Energy plus a temporary mining rate boost for 30 minutes.

rest.name: Rest Day
rest.desc: Fully restores energy for free. Long cooldown.

pharma.title: Cyber-Pharma
pharma.subtitle: Powerful boosts with high risk. Use with caution.
pharma.fail: Side effect! The result was worse than expected.

titan.name: Titan-Serum
titan.desc: +50% Strength for 1 hour. Pure power in a vial.

gh9.name: Growth Hormone GH-9
gh9.desc: Permanently increases Mass. Carries an injury risk.

mutagen.name: Mutagen X
mutagen.desc: Mutates Genetics. High risk, high reward.

gear.title: Gear
gear.subtitle: Permanent passive bonuses. Buy once — works forever.

arena.title: Arena
arena.subtitle: Enter leagues and fight for $BULV based on your athlete's stats.
arena.resultWinDesc: The opponent was crushed. Reward credited.
arena.resultLoseDesc: Not enough power this time. Train harder.

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.subtitle: Connect a TON wallet to get ready for the $BULV mainnet withdrawal.
wallet.withdrawDesc: The $BULV bridge contract is still being prepared for launch. Your game balance will convert to the token after release.
wallet.notConnected: Wallet not connected. Connect it to take part in the future $BULV airdrop.

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.subtitle: Owner-only access
admin.pickRarity: Create a new athlete with the chosen rarity
admin.resetConfirmDesc: Progress, athlete, balance and gear will be wiped permanently.
